title: Regulator capacitor placement needs review

evidence.description: Regulator input/output capacitor topology and placement are reviewed from schematic and board context

message: Regulator decoupling and capacitor placement need human review.
recommendation: Review regulator datasheets and confirm input/output capacitors are present and placed close to the pins.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when the design has no regulator or capacitor placement is documented externally.
impact: Power rails can oscillate, sag or fail during first power-up.

title: Power input protection needs review

evidence.description: External power connectors have protection appropriate to the expected environment

message: Power input protection needs human review.
recommendation: Check fuse, reverse-polarity, TVS and surge protection assumptions for external power inputs.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for lab-only boards with documented supply assumptions.
impact: Incorrect external power handling can damage the prototype or connected system.

title: Power net naming needs review

evidence.description: Input, regulator output and load power nets are named clearly enough for review

message: Power net naming needs human review.
recommendation: Confirm major power rails are named consistently and distinguish input, regulated output and load domains.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for simple boards where the net structure is obvious from the schematic.
impact: Ambiguous power nets increase review cost and hide voltage-domain mistakes.
